titleStmt.title: SII 37.488: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 488. (A.R. No. B 59 of 1942-43.) Śrīśailaṁ, Nandikotkur Taluk, Kurnool District.

summary.p: Broken slab lying outside the northern prākāra wall of the Mallikārjuna temple.
This is dated Śaka 1089 (expressed in chronogram), Āshāḍa śu. 5, corresponding to 1167 A.D.

Damaged and fragmentary. It records the gift of a perpetual lamp to the god Mallikārjuna of Śrīśaila by Vīra-Rājendrachōḷa. it also gives a string of birudas of the chief, among which may be noted the title denoting his lordship over the town Indulūru in Pākanaḍu (Pākanāṁṭi Yindulūri-Purānganāvallabha).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmatmākādhi pasamēṣuni
dhībhadēvavartmāvanī parimitēṣvayanē viyāmyē Ā
ṣāḍha māsasitadharmma Ādhautu vīrarājēṁdracōḍa I
ti nalmaḍigōsutīrtthaṁ . śrīśailaśriṁggasadanāya sanā
tanāya śrīmallikārjuna harāya surēśvarāya
Ācaṁdratāramihadīpamakhaṇḍamēraṁ prādātsyavaṁśa
bhuvanasya maṇipradīpaṁ . svasti samadhigata paṁcama
hāśabda mahāsāmaṁtādhīśvara paramamahēśvara
pākanāṁṭi miṁdulūri purāṁganā vallabha bhaya
lōbhadurlabha śaraṇāgata vajrapaṁjara [A*]rikōṭikuṁ
jara gaṇḍa nārāyaṇa sakala dharmaparāyaṇa
paranārīdūra sadguṇādhāra calamarttigaṇḍa kī
rttipūrita brahmaṇḍanāyaka pralayakāla
kālānaka calukya pagamāri vibudha śubhakāri
lāditya jana vikramāditya bhuvanaikarāya vikra
tōsahya madyāhna kalpataru
samasta praśasti sahitā
Digital edition of SII 37.488 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
